---
title: "The Rev. Bartholomew Price"
---

## The Rev. Bartholomew Price

**Dates:** (1818-1898)

### Description

mathematician

### Biography

Sedleian professor of natural philosophy at Oxford University and (from 1892) master of Pembroke College Oxford;  he was married to Amy Eliza Cole.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 9th 1882
- Letter from June 1st 1877 
- Letter from May 11th [1866]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
